content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb.dbo.#T_EMPLOYEE') IS NOT NULL								
DROP TABLE #T_EMPLOYEE;								
								
CREATE TABLE #T_EMPLOYEE								
(								
	AssociateID 	NVARCHAR(100),							
	FirstName 		Nvarchar(100),							
	LastName 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Email 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Hiredate 		Nvarchar(100), 							
	PositionStatus 	Nvarchar(100), 							
	Employee_country Nvarchar(100), 							
	Company 		Nvarchar(100),							
	JOB_FAMILY_GROUP Nvarchar(256),							
	JOB_FAMILY 		Nvarchar(256), 							
	JOB_TITLE 		Nvarchar(256),							
	Supervisor 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Sup_AssociateId Nvarchar(100),							
	Sup_Email 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level 			Integer,							
	Level0_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level0_Company 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level1_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level1_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level1_Email 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level2_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level2_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level2_Email 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level3_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level3_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level3_Email 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level4_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level4_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level4_Email 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level5_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level5_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level5_Email 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level6_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level6_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level6_Email 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level7_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level7_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level7_Email 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level8_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level8_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level8_Email			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level9_AssociateID 		Nvarchar(100),							
	Level9_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level9_Email 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level10_AssociateID 	Nvarchar(100),							
	Level10_Name 			Nvarchar(100),							
	Level10_Email 			Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_01_Name	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_01_ID	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_01_Email  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_02_Name	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_02_ID	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_02_Email  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_03_Name	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_03_ID	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_03_Email  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_04_Name	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_04_ID	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_04_Email  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_05_Name	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_05_ID	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_05_Email  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_06_Name	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_06_ID	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_06_Email  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_07_Name	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_07_ID	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_07_Email  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_08_Name	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_08_ID	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_08_Email  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_09_Name	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_09_ID	  Nvarchar(100)	,
	Supervisory_Org_09_Email  Nvarchar(100)
);								
								
Insert Into #T_EMPLOYEE	( AssociateID ,FirstName ,LastName ,Email ,							
						  Hiredate, PositionStatus, Employee_country,  Company,		
						  JOB_FAMILY_GROUP,  JOB_FAMILY, JOB_TITLE,		
						  Supervisor ,Sup_AssociateId ,Sup_Email, Level ,Level0_AssociateID,Level0_Company )		
	Select Distinct AssociateID, PayrollName_FirstName, PayrollName_LastName,  WorkContact_WorkEmail,							
				    Hiredate, PositionStatus, 
					'US' AS Employee_country, 
					CompanyName as Company,				
				    HomeDepartmentDescription as JOB_FAMILY_GROUP, 
					SubDepartment as JOB_FAMILY, 
					JobTitleDescription as JOB_TITLE,				
				    Supervisor1, ReportsToAssociateID, ReportsToEmail, 0 as Level,				
				    AssociateID as Level0_AssoiciateID, LocationCode as Level0_Company				
	from ODS.ADP_HR_EMPLOYEE 
	--Where AssociateID ='8HCCGBIA6' 


	;							
								
DECLARE @i iNT = 1;								
								
WHILE (@i>=1)								
	BEGIN							
								
		Insert Into #T_EMPLOYEE	( AssociateID ,FirstName ,LastName ,Email ,					
								  Hiredate, PositionStatus, Employee_country,  Company,
								  JOB_FAMILY_GROUP,  JOB_FAMILY, JOB_TITLE,
								  Supervisor ,Sup_AssociateId ,Sup_Email,Level ,Level0_AssociateID,Level0_Company )
		Select Distinct E.AssociateID, E.PayrollName_FirstName,E.PayrollName_LastName,  E.WorkContact_WorkEmail,						
						E.Hiredate, E.PositionStatus, 'US' AS Employee_country, E.CompanyName as Company,		
						E.HomeDepartmentDescription as JOB_FAMILY_GROUP, E.SubDepartment as JOB_FAMILY, E.JobTitleDescription as JOB_TITLE,		
						E.Supervisor1,E.ReportsToAssociateID,E.ReportsToEmail,@i as Level,T.Level0_AssociateID, T.Level0_Company		
		from ODS.ADP_HR_EMPLOYEE E Join #T_EMPLOYEE T 						
		on E.AssociateID=T.Sup_AssociateId						
		Where Level=@i-1 ;						
								
		Set @i= (Select max(level) from 						
								( Select case when (SuperVisor is NULL or Supervisor ='n/a') then -1 else @i+1 end as Level  from #T_EMPLOYEE where Level in (select Max(level) from #T_Employee) 
			     				 ) a	
			     )					
								
	End							
								
								
								
								
								
								
Update #T_EMPLOYEE set 								
	Level1_AssociateID= T2.Level1_AssociateID,							
	Level1_Name		  = T2.Level1_Name,					
	Level1_Email 	  = T2.Level1_Email,						
	Level2_AssociateID= T2.Level2_AssociateID,							
	Level2_Name		  = T2.Level2_Name,					
	Level2_Email 	  = T2.Level2_Email,						
	Level3_AssociateID= T2.Level3_AssociateID,							
	Level3_Name		  = T2.Level3_Name,					
	Level3_Email 	  = T2.Level3_Email,						
	Level4_AssociateID= T2.Level4_AssociateID,							
	Level4_Name		  = T2.Level4_Name,					
	Level4_Email 	  = T2.Level4_Email,						
	Level5_AssociateID= T2.Level5_AssociateID,							
	Level5_Name		  = T2.Level5_Name,					
	Level5_Email 	  = T2.Level5_Email,						
	Level6_AssociateID= T2.Level6_AssociateID,							
	Level6_Name		  = T2.Level6_Name,					
	Level6_Email 	  = T2.Level6_Email,						
	Level7_AssociateID= T2.Level7_AssociateID,							
	Level7_Name		  = T2.Level7_Name,					
	Level7_Email 	  = T2.Level7_Email,						
	Level8_AssociateID= T2.Level8_AssociateID,							
	Level8_Name		  = T2.Level8_Name,					
	Level8_Email 	  = T2.Level8_Email,						
	Level9_AssociateID= T2.Level9_AssociateID,							
	Level9_Name		  = T2.Level9_Name,					
	Level9_Email 	  = T2.Level9_Email,						
	Level10_AssociateID= T2.Level10_AssociateID,							
	Level10_Name	   = T2.Level10_Name,						
	Level10_Email 	   = T2.Level10_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_01_Name		= T2.Supervisory_Org_01_Name,		
	Supervisory_Org_01_ID		= T2.Supervisory_Org_01_ID,	
	Supervisory_Org_01_Email	= T2.Supervisory_Org_01_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_02_Name		= T2.Supervisory_Org_02_Name,		
	Supervisory_Org_02_ID		= T2.Supervisory_Org_02_ID,	
	Supervisory_Org_02_Email	= T2.Supervisory_Org_02_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_03_Name		= T2.Supervisory_Org_03_Name,		
	Supervisory_Org_03_ID		= T2.Supervisory_Org_03_ID,	
	Supervisory_Org_03_Email	= T2.Supervisory_Org_03_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_04_Name		= T2.Supervisory_Org_04_Name,		
	Supervisory_Org_04_ID		= T2.Supervisory_Org_04_ID,	
	Supervisory_Org_04_Email	= T2.Supervisory_Org_04_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_05_Name		= T2.Supervisory_Org_05_Name,		
	Supervisory_Org_05_ID		= T2.Supervisory_Org_05_ID,	
	Supervisory_Org_05_Email	= T2.Supervisory_Org_05_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_06_Name		= T2.Supervisory_Org_06_Name,		
	Supervisory_Org_06_ID		= T2.Supervisory_Org_06_ID,	
	Supervisory_Org_06_Email	= T2.Supervisory_Org_06_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_07_Name		= T2.Supervisory_Org_07_Name,		
	Supervisory_Org_07_ID		= T2.Supervisory_Org_07_ID,	
	Supervisory_Org_07_Email	= T2.Supervisory_Org_07_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_08_Name		= T2.Supervisory_Org_08_Name,		
	Supervisory_Org_08_ID		= T2.Supervisory_Org_08_ID,	
	Supervisory_Org_08_Email	= T2.Supervisory_Org_08_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_09_Name		= T2.Supervisory_Org_09_Name,		
	Supervisory_Org_09_ID		= T2.Supervisory_Org_09_ID,	
	Supervisory_Org_09_Email	= T2.Supervisory_Org_09_Email
		From 						
		#T_EMPLOYEE T1 Join						
			(Select Level0_AssociateID,Level0_Company,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=1 then AssociateID end) 					as Level1_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=1 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Level1_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=1 then Email end) 							as Level1_Email,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=2 then AssociateID end) 					as Level2_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=2 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Level2_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=2 then Email end) 							as Level2_Email,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=3 then AssociateID end) 					as Level3_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=3 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Level3_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=3 then Email end) 							as Level3_Email,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=4 then AssociateID end) 					as Level4_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=4 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Level4_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=4 then Email end) 							as Level4_Email,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=5 then AssociateID end) 					as Level5_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=5 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Level5_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=5 then Email end) 							as Level5_Email,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=6 then AssociateID end) 					as Level6_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=6 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Level6_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=6 then Email end) 							as Level6_Email,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=7 then AssociateID end) 					as Level7_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=7 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Level7_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=7 then Email end) 							as Level7_Email,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=8 then AssociateID end) 					as Level8_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=8 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Level8_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=8 then Email end) 							as Level8_Email,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=9 then AssociateID end) 					as Level9_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=9 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Level9_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=9 then Email end) 							as Level9_Email,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=10 then AssociateID end) 					as Level10_AssociateID,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=10 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end)as Level10_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Rownum=10 then Email end) 							as Level10_Email,
			   Max(Case when Level=2 then AssociateID end)						as Supervisory_Org_01_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Level=2 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end)	as Supervisory_Org_01_ID,					
			   Max(Case when Level=2 then Email end)							as Supervisory_Org_01_Email,
			   Max(Case when Level=3 then AssociateID end)						as Supervisory_Org_02_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Level=3 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end)	as Supervisory_Org_02_ID,					
			   Max(Case when Level=3 then Email end)							as Supervisory_Org_02_Email,
			   Max(Case when Level=4 then AssociateID end)						as Supervisory_Org_03_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Level=4 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end)	as Supervisory_Org_03_ID,					
			   Max(Case when Level=4 then Email end)							as Supervisory_Org_03_Email,
			   Max(Case when Level=5 then AssociateID end)						as Supervisory_Org_04_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Level=5 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end)	as Supervisory_Org_04_ID,					
			   Max(Case when Level=5 then Email end)							as Supervisory_Org_04_Email,
			   Max(Case when Level=6 then AssociateID end)						as Supervisory_Org_05_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Level=6 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end)	as Supervisory_Org_05_ID,					
			   Max(Case when Level=6 then Email end)							as Supervisory_Org_05_Email,
			   Max(Case when Level=7 then AssociateID end)						as Supervisory_Org_06_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Level=7 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end)	as Supervisory_Org_06_ID,					
			   Max(Case when Level=7 then Email end)							as Supervisory_Org_06_Email,
			   Max(Case when Level=8 then AssociateID end)						as Supervisory_Org_07_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Level=8 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end)	as Supervisory_Org_07_ID,					
			   Max(Case when Level=8 then Email end)							as Supervisory_Org_07_Email,
			   Max(Case when Level=9 then AssociateID end)						as Supervisory_Org_08_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Level=9 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end)	as Supervisory_Org_08_ID,					
			   Max(Case when Level=9 then Email end)							as Supervisory_Org_08_Email,
			   Max(Case when Level=10 then AssociateID end)						as Supervisory_Org_09_Name,					
			   Max(Case when Level=10 then Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) end) as Supervisory_Org_09_ID,					
			   Max(Case when Level=10 then Email end)							as Supervisory_Org_09_Email
			   from (					
					Select Level0_AssociateID,Level0_Company,AssociateID,FirstName,LastName,Email, Supervisor, Sup_AssociateID, Sup_Email,Level,					
					Case when Level0_AssociateID=AssociateID then 0 else Row_number() over(Partition by Level0_AssociateID,Level0_Company order by level Desc) end as Rownum 					
					from #T_EMPLOYEE 					
			   )a					
			   Group by  Level0_AssociateID,Level0_Company					
			) T2 on T1.Level0_AssociateID=T2.Level0_AssociateID and T1.Level0_Company=T2.Level0_Company					
	Where T1.Level=0;							


Select
	AssociateID						as EmployeeID,
	Concat(LastName,', ',FirstName) AS Employee_Preferred_Name,
	FirstName						AS Employee_Preferred_First_Name,
	LastName						AS Employee_Preferred_Last_Name,
	Email							AS Employee_Email,
	Hiredate						AS Hire_Date,
	PositionStatus					as ACtive_Status,
	Employee_country,
	Company,
	JOb_family_group,
	Job_Family,
	Job_Title,
	Level1_Name				As Org_hierarchy_Level_01_Name,
	Level1_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_01_ID,
	Level1_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_01_Email,
	Level2_Name				As Org_hierarchy_Level_02_Name,
	Level2_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_02_ID,
	Level2_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_02_Email,
	Level3_Name				As Org_hierarchy_Level_03_Name,
	Level3_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_03_ID,
	Level3_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_03_Email,
	Level4_Name				As Org_hierarchy_Level_04_Name,
	Level4_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_04_ID,
	Level4_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_04_Email,
	Level5_Name				As Org_hierarchy_Level_05_Name,
	Level5_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_05_ID,
	Level5_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_05_Email,
	Level6_Name				As Org_hierarchy_Level_06_Name,
	Level6_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_06_ID,
	Level6_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_06_Email,
	Level7_Name				As Org_hierarchy_Level_07_Name,
	Level7_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_07_ID,
	Level7_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_07_Email,
	Level8_Name				As Org_hierarchy_Level_08_Name,
	Level8_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_08_ID,
	Level8_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_08_Email,
	Level9_Name				As Org_hierarchy_Level_09_Name,
	Level9_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_09_ID,
	Level9_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_09_Email,
	Level10_Name			As Org_hierarchy_Level_10_Name,
	Level10_AssociateID		AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_10_ID,
	Level10_Email			AS Org_Hierarchy_Level_10_Email,
	SuperVisor				AS Manager_Org_Name,
	Sup_AssociateID			AS Manager_Org_ID,
	Sup_Email				AS Manager_Org_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_01_Name,
	Supervisory_Org_01_ID,
	Supervisory_Org_01_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_02_Name,
	Supervisory_Org_02_ID,
	Supervisory_Org_02_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_03_Name,
	Supervisory_Org_03_ID,
	Supervisory_Org_03_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_04_Name,
	Supervisory_Org_04_ID,
	Supervisory_Org_04_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_05_Name,
	Supervisory_Org_05_ID,
	Supervisory_Org_05_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_06_Name,
	Supervisory_Org_06_ID,
	Supervisory_Org_06_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_07_Name,
	Supervisory_Org_07_ID,
	Supervisory_Org_07_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_08_Name,
	Supervisory_Org_08_ID,
	Supervisory_Org_08_Email,
	Supervisory_Org_09_Name,
	Supervisory_Org_09_ID,
	Supervisory_Org_09_Email
from #T_EMPLOYEE where Level=0 ;
